summary: The two previously-blocking gaps (brace handling mismatch in glob_to_regex and underspecified remainder distribution) are now addressed cleanly, and no new truly blocking issues were introduced.

previous_issues_status.original_issue: Task 1.1 required brace expansion per AC but plan didn’t define it and conversion order would prevent adding it later
previous_issues_status.notes: Brace expansion is now explicitly declared out of scope and justified as not used in current manifests, removing the AC/implementation mismatch. The conversion steps no longer need to preserve braces for later processing, so the earlier ordering concern is moot.

previous_issues_status.original_issue: Task 1.4 remainder distribution underspecified; could violate max_tokens or fail to allocate full budget when remainder > 1 or first capability is at max
previous_issues_status.notes: The plan now specifies a deterministic multi-pass loop that only increments capabilities with remaining headroom, handles remainder > 1, correctly skips maxed capabilities, and explicitly documents the all-at-max case where remainder is dropped.
